utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items by name. Now verify completeness: 
- destination: specified (Prague, Czech Republic) — complete.
- travel_dates: specified (June 20th to June 24th) — dates given; user asked for 5-day trip, these are 4 nights but still specific — counts as specified.
- transportation: requires flight details with costs. Provided: round-trip flights from Paris, budget airline, economy, 4 people, cost €400. Lacks exact flight numbers/times but “details with costs” minimally covered — accept as specified.
- accommodation: requires hotel selection with costs. Provided: Family Haven Hotel for 4 nights, cost €700 — specified.
- activities: selected activities with costs. Provided three activities each with a cost — specified.
- additional_services: any extra services with costs. Provided service and cost (Included) — specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown. Provided breakdown and total cost — specified.
All 7 items are present and sufficiently detailed per the format.
